name: atril
title: atril
description:
MATE document viewer
Atril is a simple multi-page document viewer.  It can display
and print PostScript (PS), Encapsulated PostScript (EPS), DJVU, DVI, EPUB,
ComicBook and Portable Document Format (PDF) files.
.
When supported by the document, it also allows searching for text,
copying text to the clipboard, hypertext navigation, and
table-of-contents bookmarks.

arguments.description: Start atril in fullscreen mode. You must specify a document to start in fullscreen

arguments.description: Start atril in preview mode. You must specify a document to start in preview mode.
arguments.raw: --preview  Start atril in preview mode. You must specify a document to start in preview mode.

arguments.description: atril in presentation mode. You must specify a document to start in presentation
arguments.raw: -s  atril in presentation mode. You must specify a document to start in presentation

arguments.description: Start atril in preview mode. You must specify a document to start in preview mode.
arguments.raw: -w  Start atril in preview mode. You must specify a document to start in preview mode.

commands.name: atril-previewer
commands.description: show print preview for a document

commands.name: atril-thumbnailer
commands.description: create png thumbnails from atril supported documents

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use atril because MATE document viewer.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use atril as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `atril --preview ~/Desktop/stuff.ps` as documented upstream for atril.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `atril -i 2 -s ./document.pdf` as documented upstream for atril.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair atril with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `atril --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install atril. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `atril --preview ~/Desktop/stuff.ps`. Further invocations from upstream: `atril -i 2 -s ./document.pdf`.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: MATE document viewer.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: Atril - The MATE Document Viewer SYNTAX atril [OPTIONS...] [FILES...].
